text: The updated pitch deck outline looks spot on, Chloe. Getting the net take rate and Express Payouts front and center shows investors we're metrics-driven from day one. Splitting the milestones keeps the scope defensible so we aren't promising fantasy timelines before we land the cash. This is ready for the pre-seed pitch.
